blended.narrative: Le Massif is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,750 ft. Looking ahead, 81 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 39" of heavy snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
